explanation: The C code defines a main function that performs several addition operations between different pairs of integers, displaying the results on the console. The assembly code implements subroutines to track the execution of these addition instructions. It specifically checks for carry flags after the addition to print a warning message if overflow occurs. The program uses interrupt handling to monitor the execution of the addition instructions.

files.content:
;HW1: a subroutine that prints a warning message if there's carry after execute ADD command.
;
;
;
;
		.MODEL LARGE
		PUBLIC	_start_track
		PUBLIC	_end_track
		EXTRN	_printf:FAR
;
		.DATA
Int1Save	DD ?
Was_ADD		DB 0
printf_str	DB 10,' Warning: Carry on ADD',10,0
;
		.CODE
_Single_Step_Handler PROC	FAR
;
;	if (Was_ADD==1), then the previous command was 'ADD'
;		check its flags - if there is carry - print a message.
;	pop ip & cs, check if the next command is 'ADD'
;		if so, then flag:=1.
;			else flag:=0.
;
		PUSH	BP				;preserve registers & segments
		MOV		BP,SP
		PUSH	AX
		PUSH	BX
		PUSH	CX
		PUSH	DX
		PUSH	ES
		PUSH	DS
		PUSH	SI
		PUSH	DI
						
		CMP		Was_ADD,1		;if Was_ADD == 1, check carry, else 
		JNE		CHECK_ADD
		
		PUSHF					;preserve flags register
		
		MOV		AX,[BP+6]		;ax=[bp+6]=flags register after executing ADD
		SHR		AX,1			;put the carry flag (was set after executing ADD) in the current carry flag	
		
		JNC		END_CARRY		;if there carry - print messege
		
		PUSH	DS				;print warning if there's carry after execute ADD
		MOV		AX,SEG printf_str	
		MOV		DS,AX
		PUSH	DS
		PUSH	OFFSET printf_str
		CALL	_printf
		ADD		SP,4
		POP		DS
		
END_CARRY:
		POPF					;restore flags register
CHECK_ADD:
		MOV		Was_ADD,0
		MOV		SI,[BP+2]		;get the next command from Next_CS:Next_IP
		MOV		ES,[BP+4]
		MOV		AX,ES:[SI]
		CMP		AL,03h			;check if the next command is ADD
		JNE		CONT
		MOV		Was_ADD,1		;set Was_ADD=1 if the next command is ADD	
CONT:
		POP		DI				;restore registers & segments
		POP		SI
		POP		DS
		POP		ES
		POP		DX
		POP		CX
		POP		BX
		POP		AX
		MOV		SP,BP		
		POP		BP
		IRET	
_Single_Step_Handler	ENDP
;

_start_track PROC	FAR
		PUSH ES						;Int1Save = getvect(1)
		PUSH AX
		MOV	AX,0
		MOV ES,AX
		MOV AX,ES:[1*4]
		MOV WORD PTR Int1Save,AX
		MOV AX,ES:[1*4+2]
		MOV WORD PTR Int1Save+2,AX
		CLI							;setvect(1,_Single_Step_Handler)
		MOV WORD PTR ES:[1*4],OFFSET _Single_Step_Handler
		MOV WORD PTR ES:[1*4+2],SEG _Single_Step_Handler
		STI
		POP AX
		POP ES
		PUSHF						;TF=1
		POP AX
		OR AX,100000000B
		PUSH AX
		POPF
		RET
_start_track	ENDP
;
_end_track PROC	FAR
		PUSHF						;TF=0
		POP AX
		AND AX,1111111011111111B
		PUSH AX
		POPF
		PUSH ES						;setvect(1,Int1Save)
		PUSH AX
		MOV AX,0
		MOV ES,AX
		CLI
		MOV AX,WORD PTR	Int1Save
		MOV ES:[1*4],AX
		MOV AX,WORD PTR Int1Save+2
		MOV ES:[1*4+2],AX
		STI
		POP AX
		POP ES		
		RET
_end_track	ENDP
		END

;HW1: a subroutine that prints a warning message if there's carry after execute ADD command.
;
;
;
;
		.MODEL LARGE
		PUBLIC	_start_track
		PUBLIC	_end_track
		EXTRN	_printf:FAR
;
		.DATA
Int1Save	DD ?
Was_ADD		DB 0
printf_str	DB 10,' Warning: Carry on ADD',10,0
;
		.CODE
_Single_Step_Handler PROC	FAR
;
;	if (Was_ADD==1), then the previous command was 'ADD'
;		check its flags - if there is carry - print a message.
;	pop ip & cs, check if the next command is 'ADD'
;		if so, then flag:=1.
;			else flag:=0.
;
		PUSH	BP				;preserve registers & segments
		MOV		BP,SP
		PUSH	AX
		PUSH	BX
		PUSH	CX
		PUSH	DX
		PUSH	ES
		PUSH	DS
		PUSH	SI
		PUSH	DI
						
		CMP		Was_ADD,1		;if Was_ADD == 1, check carry, else 
		JNE		CHECK_ADD
		
		PUSHF					;preserve flags register
		
		MOV		AX,[BP+6]		;ax=[bp+6]=flags register after executing ADD
		SHR		AX,1			;put the carry flag (was set after executing ADD) in the current carry flag	
		
		JNC		END_CARRY		;if there carry - print messege
		
		PUSH	DS				;print warning if there's carry after execute ADD
		MOV		AX,SEG printf_str	
		MOV		DS,AX
		PUSH	DS
		PUSH	OFFSET printf_str
		CALL	_printf
		ADD		SP,4
		POP		DS
		
END_CARRY:
		POPF					;restore flags register
CHECK_ADD:
		MOV		Was_ADD,0
		MOV		SI,[BP+2]		;get the next command from Next_CS:Next_IP
		MOV		ES,[BP+4]
		MOV		AX,ES:[SI]
		CMP		AL,03h			;check if the next command is ADD
		JNE		CONT
		MOV		Was_ADD,1		;set Was_ADD=1 if the next command is ADD	
CONT:
		POP		DI				;restore registers & segments
		POP		SI
		POP		DS
		POP		ES
		POP		DX
		POP		CX
		POP		BX
		POP		AX
		MOV		SP,BP		
		POP		BP
		IRET	
_Single_Step_Handler	ENDP
;

_start_track PROC	FAR
		PUSH ES						;Int1Save = getvect(1)
		PUSH AX
		MOV	AX,0
		MOV ES,AX
		MOV AX,ES:[1*4]
		MOV WORD PTR Int1Save,AX
		MOV AX,ES:[1*4+2]
		MOV WORD PTR Int1Save+2,AX
		CLI							;setvect(1,_Single_Step_Handler)
		MOV WORD PTR ES:[1*4],OFFSET _Single_Step_Handler
		MOV WORD PTR ES:[1*4+2],SEG _Single_Step_Handler
		STI
		POP AX
		POP ES
		PUSHF						;TF=1
		POP AX
		OR AX,100000000B
		PUSH AX
		POPF
		RET
_start_track	ENDP
;
_end_track PROC	FAR
		PUSHF						;TF=0
		POP AX
		AND AX,1111111011111111B
		PUSH AX
		POPF
		PUSH ES						;setvect(1,Int1Save)
		PUSH AX
		MOV AX,0
		MOV ES,AX
		CLI
		MOV AX,WORD PTR	Int1Save
		MOV ES:[1*4],AX
		MOV AX,WORD PTR Int1Save+2
		MOV ES:[1*4+2],AX
		STI
		POP AX
		POP ES		
		RET
_end_track	ENDP
		END

name: 2008-08-23_assignment-1
subject: Assignment #1
summary: This project consists of a simple C and assembly program that performs multiple addition operations and tracks the execution using interrupt handling.
